text:
SUNRISE FAMILY CLINIC — Progress Note
Demo only — synthetic data, not medical advice. No real PHI.

Patient: Rahul Sharma   MRN: RH-4471
Date: 2026-04-20

Blood pressure inadequately controlled on lisinopril. Stopped lisinopril; switched to amlodipine 5 mg daily. Patient tolerating well. — Dr. R. Mehta
